reason: The image depicts a crowd of men in suits and hats outside a building resembling the New York Stock Exchange. The clothing style, briefcases, and architecture are generally consistent with the 1910s. The absence of obvious modern technology (smartphones, cars) supports its potential validity. However, the suits appear slightly more modern in their cut than what was typical in 1910. The tall buildings in the background look much taller and more modern, I'd suggest to make those buildings a little shorter.
